name: Carver Federal Savings Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured federal savings bank offering high-yield savings accounts, CDs, and business lending solutions with competitive APY rates up to 4.25%.
description_long:
Carver Federal Savings Bank is an FDIC-insured financial institution operating as a federally-chartered savings bank. The bank is backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government and maintains a strong focus on community banking and small business support.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of personal and business banking products. For consumers, they provide high-yield online savings accounts (up to 4.00% APY), money market accounts, and certificates of deposit (up to 4.25% APR with terms from 30 days to 60 months). Personal checking accounts feature no minimum balance requirements and no monthly service charges. For businesses, Carver offers business checking accounts (including their Carver Community Business Free Checking with no monthly fees), business lending solutions, commercial loans, and customized funding options.

Carver distinguishes itself through emphasis on community investment and accessibility. Their personal checking accounts can be opened in 5 minutes with no minimum balance or monthly fees. The bank provides mobile banking capabilities and maintains physical branch locations. Business customers receive tailored solutions and expert guidance focused on growth and expansion opportunities.

The bank's primary strength lies in competitive savings rates and fee-free checking products. However, the website lacks detailed information about loan rates, specific business loan terms, or comprehensive fee schedules beyond checking accounts. Limited transparency on approval criteria and product details may require customers to contact branches directly for complete information. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: High-yield online savings accounts (up to 4.00% APY)
Certificates of deposit - personal (30 days to 60 months, up to 4.25% APR)
Personal checking accounts (no minimum balance, no monthly fees)
Business lending and customized funding solutions
Lost or stolen debit card replacement
pros: High-yield savings accounts earning up to 4.00% APY with daily compounding and FDIC insurance
Personal checking accounts with zero minimum balance requirements and no monthly service charges
Business checking (Carver Community Business Free Checking) with no monthly fees and 200 free items per statement cycle
Certificates of deposit with flexible terms ranging from 30 days to 60 months, up to 4.25% APR
Fast account opening process (3-5 minutes for online savings and personal checking)
Mobile banking app available for convenient account management
FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Physical branch locations for in-person banking and personalized service
cons: Website lacks specific interest rates for business products and business loan APR/terms
Limited transparency on business lending approval criteria, loan amounts, or repayment terms
No detailed fee schedule provided beyond checking account information
Minimal information about alternative products like credit cards or personal loans
No clear disclosure of minimum deposit requirements for some savings products
best_for: Consumers seeking high-yield savings accounts with competitive rates and FDIC protection
Small business owners needing no-fee checking accounts and community-focused lending
Savers with flexible timelines interested in certificates of deposit with various term lengths
Individuals prioritizing accessible, convenient banking with mobile and branch options
diagnosis: Carver Federal Savings Bank is best for consumers and small business owners seeking FDIC-insured savings products with competitive rates and fee-free checking, or businesses needing community-focused lending relationships. The main caveat is that detailed product terms, loan rates, and underwriting criteria are not transparent on their website, requiring direct contact with branches for comprehensive product information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_mdi_status: Minority Board and Serving African American Community
